summary: S3-MEDITATION-CLEANUP verified complete. mg_meditation.gd fully deleted, registry clean, dispatch table clean, test files clean, GAMES['esprit'] bible-correct. LOW doc lag in docs/ (no gameplay impact).

checks.evidence: create_minigame() match block lines 134-136: only mg_volonte, mg_apaisement, mg_sang_froid present. No mg_meditation case.

Only non-functional references found: docs/20_card_system/DOC_MINIGAMES.md, docs/GAME_BEHAVIOR.md, docs/GAME_ENCYCLOPEDIA.md, docs/audits/perf_audit_raw.json (old snapshot), tools/autodev/status/* (coordination logs). checks.evidence: minigame_registry.gd line 27: "esprit": ["mg_volonte", "mg_apaisement", "mg_sang_froid"]. 3 entries, bible s.6.2 compliant. No 4th entry (mg_meditation removed).

checks.description: No dead preload reference to mg_meditation in test files
checks.evidence: grep -rn 'meditation' tests/ → (empty). test_minigames_extra.gd: no meditation test functions, no test runner entries, no m1 check in test_all_scores_clamp_0_100. S3-MEDITATION-CLEANUP cycle confirmed removal of 3 test functions + 3 runner entries + shared extreme-input check (PAT-046).
